use_cases: Notification center for SaaS applications displaying stacked alerts
Activity feed showing real-time updates from integrated services
Alert management system with expandable notification cards
Dashboard widget for displaying multiple incoming notifications
Interactive notification stack with hover-reveal animations
ai_summary: A stacked notification component featuring animated hover interactions that reveal and spread out multiple alert cards in a staggered sequence. Uses spring physics for natural-feeling motion with subtle rotation and shadow changes. Ideal for notification centers in SaaS dashboards, activity feeds from integrated services like GitHub or Stripe, and alert management interfaces requiring a space-efficient yet interactive notification display.
